# Fun Zone Tenerife — Location-Based Entertainment Hub
# https://www.funzonetenerife.com

> Fun Zone Tenerife is a multi-activity entertainment venue in Playa de las Américas, Tenerife (Canary Islands, Spain). We offer four distinct experiences: outdoor escape games across Tenerife's historic towns, axe throwing, interactive quiz rooms, and darts (classic & pixel). Perfect for tourists, families, corporate team building, bachelor parties, and group events.

## Outdoor Escape Games — Tenerife Chronicle
Our flagship product: self-guided outdoor escape games (city games / street escapes) set in real Tenerife towns. Players use their smartphones (BYOD model) to solve GPS-triggered puzzles tied to real historical facts. No time pressure — self-paced exploration. Unlimited players per code. Available in 5 languages (EN, FR, ES, DE, IT).

### Available Escape Games:
- **The Code of Ichasagua** — Los Cristianos & Montaña Guaza (3-4h, difficulty 3/5). Explore the Guanche civilization's last stronghold. Urban + mountain trail.
- **The Chest of Three Keys** — San Cristóbal de La Laguna, UNESCO World Heritage (2-2.5h, difficulty 4/5). Follow corsair Amaro Pargo's legacy through the historic city center. Fully flat, accessible.
- **The Loot of La Batería** — Puerto de la Cruz (1.75h, difficulty 3/5). Track pirate treasure along the historic harbour and botanical gardens.
- **The Ashes of the Soul** — Garachico (2.75h, difficulty 5/5). Uncover volcanic history in a town destroyed and reborn from lava. Most popular.

### Escape Game Pricing:
- 1 phone (1 team): 19€
- 2 phones (2 teams): 25€
- 3 phones (3 teams): 35€

### Escape Game Technology:
- Geofencing / GPS-triggered narrative
- Self-guided / self-hosted tour (no game master needed)
- BYOD (Bring Your Own Device) — smartphone required
- 8-hour activation window after code redemption
- Activation code delivered by email after payment

## Axe Throwing
Indoor axe throwing lanes in Playa de las Américas. Traditional axes, ninja stars, shurikens. Professional coaching included. No experience needed. From 12€/person.
- Traditional Axe Throwing (1h)
- Ninja Axe + Shurikens (1h, 2h)
- Premium Experience (2h)

## Quiz Room — QuizzaBoom
Tenerife's first interactive quiz room with buzzer systems, giant screens, thousands of questions. From 12€/person.

## Darts
Classic steel-tip dartboards and revolutionary Darts Pixel (interactive digital targets). From 5€/person.

## Special Events
- Corporate Team Building (B2B)
- Birthday Parties (kids & adults)
- Bachelor/Bachelorette Parties (Despedida de Soltera/Soltero)

## Practical Information
- **Address:** Avenida Arquitecto Gomez Cuesta 22, Zentral Center, Playa Las Americas, Arona 38650, Tenerife
- **Opening Hours:** Tuesday-Sunday, 2PM-8PM. Closed Mondays.
- **Phone:** +34 623 362 229
- **Email:** axethrowingtenerife@gmail.com
- **Languages:** English, French, Spanish, German, Italian
- **Booking:** https://www.funzonetenerife.com/en/book
- **Escape Games:** https://www.funzonetenerife.com/en/escape-game

## Industry Keywords
Location-Based Entertainment (LBE), outdoor escape room, city games, urban games, street escape, city hunt, scavenger hunt, experience-driven entertainment, self-guided tour, GPS adventure, phygital experience, augmented reality tourism, Tenerife activities, things to do in Tenerife, Canary Islands entertainment.
